title.en: Clause 1 (Overview): Scope, Purpose, and the Bridging Map
title.zh: 第 1 章（概览）：范围、目的与桥接全景图

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022 is the standard that turns a pile of separate local networks into one well-behaved switched network. Its opening clause, Clause 1 (Overview), answers three questions before any of the heavy machinery begins: what does the standard cover (1.1 Scope), why does it exist (1.2 Purpose), and what exactly does it specify, point by point (1.3 Introduction). Two foundational terms appear immediately. A Local Area Network (LAN) is a single shared network segment. A Bridge is a device that interconnects LANs and forwards frames between them; the standard recognizes two flavors — the MAC Bridge (Media Access Control Bridge, which forwards based on MAC addresses) and the VLAN Bridge (Virtual LAN Bridge, which also understands VLAN tags). Collectively they are simply called Bridges.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.1Q-2022 这份标准的作用，是把一堆彼此独立的局域网整合成一个秩序井然的交换网络。它的开篇第 1 章（概览）在所有复杂机制登场之前，先回答三个问题：标准覆盖什么（1.1 范围）、为什么需要它（1.2 目的）、以及它逐条具体规定了什么（1.3 引言）。开头立刻出现两个基础术语。局域网（LAN，Local Area Network）是单个共享的网络段。桥（Bridge）是把多个 LAN 互连、并在它们之间转发帧的设备；标准定义了两种桥——MAC 桥（媒体访问控制桥，按 MAC 地址转发）和 VLAN 桥（虚拟局域网桥，同时能识别 VLAN 标签）。它们统称为桥。

blocks.en: VLAN stands for Virtual Local Area Network. The core idea: stations placed in the same VLAN communicate as if they shared one physical LAN, while traffic between different VLANs is restricted. That lets a network administrator carve logical groups of stations out of the same physical wiring, and add, remove, or move stations between groups by configuration rather than by re-cabling. MAC stands for Media Access Control — the lower part of the data-link layer that governs how a device gets access to the shared medium and carries source and destination hardware addresses.
blocks.zh: VLAN 即虚拟局域网（Virtual Local Area Network）。核心思想是：处于同一个 VLAN 中的站点彼此通信，就好像它们共享同一个物理 LAN；而不同 VLAN 之间的流量则受到限制。这让网络管理员能够在同一套物理布线之上划分出逻辑上的站点分组，并通过配置（而非重新布线）来增加、移除或在分组之间移动站点。MAC 即媒体访问控制（Media Access Control），是数据链路层的下半部分，负责管理设备如何取得对共享介质的访问权，并承载源和目的硬件地址。

blocks.en: 1.1 Scope is deliberately tight: this standard specifies Bridges that interconnect individual LANs — each supporting the IEEE 802 MAC Service, possibly using different or identical media access methods — to provide Bridged Networks and VLANs. 1.2 Purpose is one sentence: Bridges allow the compatible interconnection of information-technology equipment attached to separate individual LANs. In plain terms, a laptop on Ethernet and a device on another 802 LAN can exchange frames through a Bridge without either side knowing or caring how the other side reaches the wire.
blocks.zh: 1.1 范围刻意收得很紧：本标准规定的桥用于互连各个独立的 LAN——每个 LAN 都支持 IEEE 802 MAC 服务，并且可能采用不同或相同的媒体访问方法——从而构成桥接网络和 VLAN。1.2 目的只有一句话：桥使得连接在各个独立 LAN 上的信息技术设备能够兼容地互连。说白了，一台接在以太网上的笔记本和另一个 802 LAN 上的设备，可以通过桥交换帧，而双方都无需知道、也无需在意对方是如何接入线路的。

blocks.en: Why 'compatible interconnection' is the whole point: the MAC Service is a common abstraction that every IEEE 802 LAN technology presents upward. A Bridge plugs LANs together at that common layer, so it does not matter whether one side is wired Ethernet and the other is a different 802 medium — they share the same service interface, so frames cross cleanly.
blocks.zh: 为什么“兼容互连”是关键所在：MAC 服务是每一种 IEEE 802 LAN 技术向上层呈现的统一抽象。桥在这一共同层面上把各 LAN 连接起来，因此一边是有线以太网、另一边是另一种 802 介质都无所谓——它们共享同一个服务接口，帧便能干净地跨越。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  A[Station A] --- L1[LAN 1]
  B[Station B] --- L1
  L1 --- BR{Bridge}
  BR --- L2[LAN 2]
  L2 --- C[Station C]
  L2 --- D[Station D]
  BR -. enforces .-> V[VLAN boundaries]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  A[站点 A] --- L1[LAN 1]
  B[站点 B] --- L1
  L1 --- BR{桥}
  BR --- L2[LAN 2]
  L2 --- C[站点 C]
  L2 --- D[站点 D]
  BR -. 实施 .-> V[VLAN 边界]

blocks.en: 1.3 Introduction is the standard's own table of contents in prose: a long lettered list (a through ai and beyond) of everything 802.1Q specifies. It is worth skimming once because every later clause traces back to one of these promises. The first group (items a–n) covers the foundations: positioning VLAN support inside an architectural model of the MAC Sublayer; defining the principles of MAC Bridge and VLAN Bridge operation in terms of preserving the MAC Service and maintaining quality of service (QoS); the Enhanced Internal Sublayer Service (EISS) used by frame-relay functions; the VLAN tag frame format carrying a VLAN Identifier (VID) and priority; rules for adding and removing tags; automatic topology configuration; management and MIB modules; YANG models; and the Multiple Spanning Tree Algorithm and Protocol (MSTP) that keeps a multi-Bridge network loop-free.
blocks.zh: 1.3 引言其实是这份标准用散文写成的目录：一长串带字母编号的清单（从 a 到 ai 乃至更后），列出了 802.1Q 规定的全部内容。值得通读一遍，因为后面每一章都能追溯到这里的某一条承诺。第一组（a–n）涵盖基础：把 VLAN 支持定位在 MAC 子层的体系结构模型之中；以“保持 MAC 服务、维持服务质量（QoS，Quality of Service）”的方式定义 MAC 桥与 VLAN 桥的运行原则；帧中继功能所用的增强型内部子层服务（EISS，Enhanced Internal Sublayer Service）；承载 VLAN 标识符（VID）和优先级的 VLAN 标签帧格式；标签的添加与移除规则；拓扑自动配置；管理与 MIB 模块；YANG 模型；以及让多桥网络保持无环路的多生成树算法与协议（MSTP，Multiple Spanning Tree Algorithm and Protocol）。

blocks.en: The second group (items o–aa) extends the standard for service providers. It distinguishes Customer VLANs (C-VLANs, administered by one customer) from Service VLANs (S-VLANs, used by the provider to keep customers separated), specifies a distinct tag format for each, and defines the components of a Provider Bridge. The remaining groups add Connectivity Fault Management (CFM) for detecting and isolating connectivity faults; provisioned traffic-engineered paths inside Provider Backbone Bridged Networks (PBBNs); the Multiple Registration Protocol (MRP) family — MVRP for VLANs, MMRP for MAC addresses, MSRP for streams, MIRP for I-SID flushing; and Provider Backbone Bridges (PBBs) that scale a network to over sixteen million service instances by encapsulating customer frames.
blocks.zh: 第二组（o–aa）为服务提供商扩展了标准。它区分了客户 VLAN（C-VLAN，由单个客户管理）与服务 VLAN（S-VLAN，由提供商用来隔离不同客户），为二者分别规定了不同的标签格式，并定义了提供商桥（Provider Bridge）的组成部件。其余各组还增加了：用于检测和定位连通性故障的连通性故障管理（CFM，Connectivity Fault Management）；提供商骨干桥接网络（PBBN）内可预置的流量工程路径；多重注册协议（MRP）家族——VLAN 用 MVRP、MAC 地址用 MMRP、流用 MSRP、按 I-SID 清除用 MIRP；以及通过封装客户帧把网络扩展到一千六百多万个服务实例的提供商骨干桥（PBB，Provider Backbone Bridge）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 440 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="10" y="40" width="70" height="40"/><rect x="80" y="40" width="70" height="40"/><rect x="150" y="40" width="50" height="40"/><rect x="200" y="40" width="50" height="40"/><rect x="250" y="40" width="180" height="40"/><text x="45" y="65" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Dest MAC</text><text x="115" y="65" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Src MAC</text><text x="175" y="60" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">TPID</text><text x="225" y="60" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">PCP/VID</text><text x="340" y="65" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Payload</text><text x="200" y="25" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">VLAN tag inserted between Src MAC and Payload</text><line x1="150" y1="95" x2="250" y2="95"/><text x="200" y="115" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">VID + priority (PCP)</text></svg>

caption.en: Conceptual VLAN-tagged frame from 1.3(f): a tag carrying a VLAN Identifier (VID) and priority (PCP) is inserted into a user data frame so Bridges can route and prioritize it. TPID = Tag Protocol Identifier.
caption.zh: 源自 1.3(f) 的 VLAN 标签帧概念图：承载 VLAN 标识符（VID）与优先级（PCP）的标签被插入用户数据帧，使桥能够据此转发并区分优先级。TPID 即标签协议标识符。

blocks.en: A historical footnote worth knowing: MRP (Multiple Registration Protocol) replaced the older GARP (Generic Attribute Registration Protocol) from IEEE Std 802.1D-2004. Likewise MVRP and MMRP replaced the older GVRP and GMRP. If you read legacy switch docs, that is why the names changed.
blocks.zh: 一个值得了解的历史脚注：MRP（多重注册协议）取代了 IEEE Std 802.1D-2004 中较早的 GARP（通用属性注册协议）。同样地，MVRP 和 MMRP 取代了较早的 GVRP 和 GMRP。如果你在阅读旧款交换机文档，名字变了正是这个原因。

summary.en: Coverage map: exactly where Clause 1's three units live
summary.zh: 覆盖映射：第 1 章三个小节的确切位置

blocks.en: Clause 1 (Overview) opens the standard with an unnumbered overview paragraph and three numbered units, all on pages 75-78. 1.1 Scope (p.75) states that the standard specifies Bridges interconnecting individual LANs — each supporting the IEEE 802 MAC Service over different or identical media access methods — to provide Bridged Networks and VLANs. 1.2 Purpose (p.75) gives the single-sentence rationale: Bridges allow the compatible interconnection of information-technology equipment attached to separate individual LANs. 1.3 Introduction (p.76-78) is the lettered specification roadmap: items a-n cover the core MAC/VLAN Bridge architecture, EISS, the VID-and-priority tag format, tag add/remove rules, automatic topology configuration, management/MIB/YANG, and MSTP; items o-aa add Provider Bridges with C-VLANs and S-VLANs; the later groups add Connectivity Fault Management (CFM), provisioned traffic engineering in Provider Backbone Bridged Networks (PBBNs) including Ethernet Switched Paths (ESPs) and Traffic Engineering Service Instances (TESIs), the Multiple Registration Protocol (MRP) family (MVRP, MMRP, MSRP, MIRP), and Provider Backbone Bridges (PBBs) with the I-TAG / I-SID encapsulation. Every later clause of 802.1Q delivers on one of these lettered promises.
blocks.zh: 第 1 章（概览）以一段未编号的概览开篇，随后是三个带编号的小节，全部位于第 75–78 页。1.1 范围（第 75 页）说明：本标准规定的桥用于互连各个独立 LAN——每个 LAN 都通过不同或相同的媒体访问方法支持 IEEE 802 MAC 服务——以构成桥接网络和 VLAN。1.2 目的（第 75 页）给出一句话理由：桥使连接在各独立 LAN 上的信息技术设备能够兼容互连。1.3 引言（第 76–78 页）是带字母编号的规范路线图：a–n 涵盖核心的 MAC/VLAN 桥体系结构、EISS、含 VID 与优先级的标签格式、标签增删规则、拓扑自动配置、管理/MIB/YANG，以及 MSTP；o–aa 增加了带 C-VLAN 和 S-VLAN 的提供商桥；其后各组又加入了连通性故障管理（CFM）、提供商骨干桥接网络（PBBN）中可预置的流量工程（含以太网交换路径 ESP 与流量工程服务实例 TESI）、多重注册协议（MRP）家族（MVRP、MMRP、MSRP、MIRP），以及采用 I-TAG / I-SID 封装的提供商骨干桥（PBB）。802.1Q 后续的每一章，都是在兑现这里某一条带字母的承诺。

blocks.en: The takeaway from Clause 1: 802.1Q is layered like an onion. The innermost layer is a plain MAC Bridge that just forwards frames between LANs while preserving the MAC Service. Around it wraps the VLAN Bridge with tags and QoS. Around that wrap provider features — Provider Bridges, Provider Backbone Bridges, fault management, and traffic engineering — each reusing the layer beneath it. Knowing this shape means that when you later meet a clause about, say, S-VLAN components or MSTP, you already know which lettered promise in 1.3 it is fulfilling and why.
blocks.zh: 第 1 章的要点：802.1Q 像洋葱一样层层包裹。最内层是一个朴素的 MAC 桥，它只负责在 LAN 之间转发帧、同时保持 MAC 服务。外面包着带标签和 QoS 的 VLAN 桥。再外面包着面向提供商的功能——提供商桥、提供商骨干桥、故障管理与流量工程——每一层都复用其内层。掌握了这个结构，当你日后遇到某一章（比如关于 S-VLAN 部件或 MSTP）时，你就已经知道它在兑现 1.3 中的哪一条带字母承诺，以及为什么。

cites.note: 1.3 Introduction — lettered specification roadmap (items a through aq)
